---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(rvest)
library(xml2)
library(jsonlite)
library(purrr)
```

```{r}

library(rvest)
library(xml2)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)

base_url <- "https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/52-week-gainers/"
dest_folder <- "C:/Users/lenovo/Desktop/r_pkgs/yahoo_pages"

dir.create(dest_folder, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

total_rows <- 150
page_size <- 25
starts <- seq(0, total_rows - page_size, by = page_size)

scrape_yahoo_page <- function(start_value, page_size = 25, dest_folder) {
  url <- paste0(base_url, "?start=", start_value, "&count=", page_size)
  
  html_file <- file.path(
    dest_folder,
    paste0("yahoo_52_week_gainers_", start_value, ".html")
  )
  
  status <- system2(
    "curl.exe",
    args = c(
      "-L",
      "-A", "Mozilla/5.0",
      "-o", shQuote(html_file),
      url
    )
  )
  
  if (status != 0 || !file.exists(html_file)) {
    message("Falló descarga para start=", start_value)
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  page <- read_html(html_file)
  
  tables <- page %>%
    html_elements("table") %>%
    html_table(fill = TRUE)
  
  if (length(tables) == 0) {
    message("No se encontraron tablas para start=", start_value)
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  out <- tables[[1]]
  
  # arreglar nombre vacío
  names(out)[names(out) == ""] <- "Chart"
  
  out %>%
    mutate(
      start = start_value,
      source_url = url
    )
}

all_data <- map_dfr(
  starts,
  scrape_yahoo_page,
  page_size = page_size,
  dest_folder = dest_folder
)

all_data
```

```{r}

parse_yahoo_num <- function(x) {
  x <- str_trim(x)
  
  multiplier <- case_when(
    str_detect(x, "[Kk]$") ~ 1e3,
    str_detect(x, "[Mm]$") ~ 1e6,
    str_detect(x, "[Bb]$") ~ 1e9,
    str_detect(x, "[Tt]$") ~ 1e12,
    TRUE ~ 1
  )
  
  number_part <- x %>%
    str_remove("[KkMmBbTt]$") %>%
    parse_number()
  
  number_part * multiplier
}

```

```{r}
all_data_clean<-all_data %>%
  mutate(
    Price_raw = Price,
    Price = str_extract(Price_raw, "^[0-9,.]+"),
    Price = parse_number(Price),
    `Change %` = parse_number(`Change %`),
    Volume = parse_yahoo_num(Volume),
    `Avg Vol (3M)` = parse_yahoo_num(`Avg Vol (3M)`),
    `Market Cap` = parse_yahoo_num(`Market Cap`),
    `52 Wk Change %` = parse_number(`52 Wk Change %`)
  )%>%
  mutate(
    `P/E Ratio (TTM)` = na_if(`P/E Ratio (TTM)`, "--"),
    `P/E Ratio (TTM)` = parse_number(`P/E Ratio (TTM)`),
    `52 Wk Range` = str_squish(`52 Wk Range`)
  ) %>%
  separate(
    `52 Wk Range`,
    into = c("wk52_low", "wk52_high"),
    sep = "\\s+",
    convert = TRUE
  ) %>% 
  select(-Chart) %>% 
  mutate(date=today())
```


```{r}
library(DBI)
library(RPostgres)
library(dplyr)

yahoo_52wk_db <- all_data_clean %>%
  transmute(
    Symbol            = as.character(Symbol),
    Name              = as.character(Name),
    Price             = as.numeric(Price),
    Change            = as.numeric(Change),
    `Change %`        = as.numeric(`Change %`),
    Volume            = as.numeric(Volume),
    `Avg Vol (3M)`    = as.numeric(`Avg Vol (3M)`),
    `Market Cap`      = as.numeric(`Market Cap`),
    `P/E Ratio (TTM)` = as.numeric(`P/E Ratio (TTM)`),
    `52 Wk Change %`  = as.numeric(`52 Wk Change %`),
    wk52_low          = as.numeric(wk52_low),
    wk52_high         = as.character(wk52_high),
    start             = as.numeric(start),
    source_url        = as.character(source_url),
    Price_raw         = as.character(Price_raw),
    date              = as.Date(date)
  ) %>%
  distinct(Symbol, date, .keep_all = TRUE)

con <- dbConnect(
  RPostgres::Postgres(),
  host     = "aws-0-us-east-2.pooler.supabase.com",
  port     = 5432,
  dbname   = "postgres",
  user     = "postgres.zdizrqyeuyqdlmvgadkm",
  password = "DMPS1934*",
  sslmode  = "require"
)

dbGetQuery(con, "select '✅ connected' as status, now();")

dbExecute(con, '
  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.yahoo_52_week_gainers (
    "Symbol" text,
    "Name" text,
    "Price" double precision,
    "Change" double precision,
    "Change %" double precision,
    "Volume" double precision,
    "Avg Vol (3M)" double precision,
    "Market Cap" double precision,
    "P/E Ratio (TTM)" double precision,
    "52 Wk Change %" double precision,
    "wk52_low" double precision,
    "wk52_high" text,
    "start" double precision,
    "source_url" text,
    "Price_raw" text,
    "date" date,
    PRIMARY KEY ("Symbol", "date")
  );
')

dbWriteTable(
  con,
  "tmp_yahoo_52_week_gainers",
  yahoo_52wk_db,
  temporary = TRUE,
  overwrite = TRUE
)

dbExecute(con, '
  INSERT INTO public.yahoo_52_week_gainers AS t
    ("Symbol", "Name", "Price", "Change", "Change %", "Volume",
     "Avg Vol (3M)", "Market Cap", "P/E Ratio (TTM)", "52 Wk Change %",
     "wk52_low", "wk52_high", "start", "source_url", "Price_raw", "date")
  SELECT
    "Symbol",
    "Name",
    "Price",
    "Change",
    "Change %",
    "Volume",
    "Avg Vol (3M)",
    "Market Cap",
    "P/E Ratio (TTM)",
    "52 Wk Change %",
    "wk52_low",
    "wk52_high",
    "start",
    "source_url",
    "Price_raw",
    "date"
  FROM tmp_yahoo_52_week_gainers
  ON CONFLICT ("Symbol", "date") DO UPDATE
  SET
    "Name"            = EXCLUDED."Name",
    "Price"           = EXCLUDED."Price",
    "Change"          = EXCLUDED."Change",
    "Change %"        = EXCLUDED."Change %",
    "Volume"          = EXCLUDED."Volume",
    "Avg Vol (3M)"    = EXCLUDED."Avg Vol (3M)",
    "Market Cap"      = EXCLUDED."Market Cap",
    "P/E Ratio (TTM)" = EXCLUDED."P/E Ratio (TTM)",
    "52 Wk Change %"  = EXCLUDED."52 Wk Change %",
    "wk52_low"        = EXCLUDED."wk52_low",
    "wk52_high"       = EXCLUDED."wk52_high",
    "start"           = EXCLUDED."start",
    "source_url"      = EXCLUDED."source_url",
    "Price_raw"       = EXCLUDED."Price_raw";
')

dbDisconnect(con)

```



```{r}
con <- dbConnect(
  RPostgres::Postgres(),
  host     = "aws-0-us-east-2.pooler.supabase.com",
  port     = 5432,
  dbname   = "postgres",
  user     = "postgres.zdizrqyeuyqdlmvgadkm",   # ← include project ref!
  password = "DMPS1934*",
  sslmode  = "require"
)

data <- DBI::dbReadTable(con, "yahoo_52_week_gainers")
```



```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(jsonlite)
library(lubridate)
library(zoo)

download_yahoo_chart <- function(symbol, from, to, dest_folder = tempdir()) {
  period1 <- as.integer(as.POSIXct(from, tz = "UTC"))
  period2 <- as.integer(as.POSIXct(to,   tz = "UTC"))
  
  url <- paste0(
    "https://query1.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/",
    symbol,
    "?period1=", period1,
    "&period2=", period2,
    "&interval=1d&includePrePost=false&events=div%2Csplits"
  )
  
  json_file <- file.path(dest_folder, paste0(symbol, "_chart.json"))
  curl_bin  <- if (.Platform$OS.type == "windows") "curl.exe" else "curl"
  
  status <- tryCatch(
    system2(
      curl_bin,
      args = c(
        "-L",
        "-A", "Mozilla/5.0",
        "-o", shQuote(json_file),
        url
      )
    ),
    error = function(e) 1
  )
  
  if (!file.exists(json_file) || status != 0) {
    message("Failed download: ", symbol)
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  txt <- paste(readLines(json_file, warn = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8"), collapse = "\n")
  obj <- tryCatch(fromJSON(txt, simplifyDataFrame = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(obj)) return(NULL)
  
  result <- obj$chart$result[[1]]
  if (is.null(result) || is.null(result$timestamp)) return(NULL)
  
  q <- result$indicators$quote[[1]]
  if (is.null(q)) return(NULL)
  
  tibble(
    symbol = symbol,
    date   = as.Date(as.POSIXct(result$timestamp, origin = "1970-01-01", tz = "UTC")),
    open   = as.numeric(q$open),
    high   = as.numeric(q$high),
    low    = as.numeric(q$low),
    close  = as.numeric(q$close),
    volume = as.numeric(q$volume)
  ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(date), !is.na(close))
}

flag_bad_history <- function(prices_tbl, min_nonzero_days = 20, min_total_days = 20) {
  prices_tbl %>%
    mutate(
      flat_bar = !is.na(open) & !is.na(high) & !is.na(low) & !is.na(close) &
        open == high & high == low & low == close,
      zero_vol = is.na(volume) | volume == 0
    ) %>%
    group_by(symbol) %>%
    summarise(
      n_days = n(),
      nonzero_vol_days = sum(!zero_vol, na.rm = TRUE),
      all_flat_zero = all(flat_bar & zero_vol),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      bad_history = all_flat_zero |
        nonzero_vol_days < min_nonzero_days |
        n_days < min_total_days
    )
}

add_ma_columns_to_dataset <- function(df, lookback_days = 80) {
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      Symbol = as.character(Symbol),
      date = as.Date(date)
    )
  
  tickers <- unique(df$Symbol)
  min_dt  <- min(df$date, na.rm = TRUE) - lookback_days
  max_dt  <- max(df$date, na.rm = TRUE) + 1
  
  prices_list <- purrr::map(tickers, ~ download_yahoo_chart(.x, from = min_dt, to = max_dt))
  names(prices_list) <- tickers
  
  failed <- names(prices_list)[purrr::map_lgl(prices_list, is.null)]
  if (length(failed) > 0) {
    message("Failed tickers: ", paste(failed, collapse = ", "))
  }
  
  valid_prices <- prices_list[!purrr::map_lgl(prices_list, is.null)]
  if (length(valid_prices) == 0) {
    stop("No se pudo descargar ningún ticker.")
  }
  
  prices <- bind_rows(valid_prices)
  
  quality_tbl <- flag_bad_history(prices)
  
  bad_symbols <- quality_tbl %>%
    filter(bad_history) %>%
    pull(symbol)
  
  if (length(bad_symbols) > 0) {
    message("Excluded bad symbols: ", paste(bad_symbols, collapse = ", "))
  }
  
  prices <- prices %>%
    filter(!symbol %in% bad_symbols)
  
  ma_tbl <- prices %>%
    group_by(symbol) %>%
    arrange(date, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(
      ma10 = zoo::rollmean(close, 10, fill = NA, align = "right"),
      ma20 = zoo::rollmean(close, 20, fill = NA, align = "right")
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    transmute(
      Symbol = symbol,
      date,
      close_px = close,
      ma10,
      ma20,
      close_above_ma10 = close > ma10,
      close_above_ma20 = close > ma20,
      ma10_above_ma20 = ma10 > ma20,
      ma_setup_ok = close > ma10 & close > ma20 & ma10 > ma20
    )
  
  df %>%
    left_join(ma_tbl, by = c("Symbol", "date"))
}
```


```{r}
data_enriched <- add_ma_columns_to_dataset(all_data_clean)

glimpse(data_enriched)
```

```{r}
#ddd %>% glimpse()
```


```{r}
#ddd %>% select(-X) %>% rbind(data_enriched)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

standardize_yahoo <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    select(-any_of("X")) %>%
    rename(
      Symbol = any_of("Symbol"),
      Name = any_of("Name"),
      Price = any_of("Price"),
      Change = any_of("Change"),
      `Change %` = any_of("Change.."),
      `Avg Vol (3M)` = any_of("Avg.Vol..3M."),
      `Market Cap` = any_of("Market.Cap"),
      `P/E Ratio (TTM)` = any_of("P.E.Ratio..TTM."),
      `52 Wk Change %` = any_of("X52.Wk.Change..")
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      date = as.Date(date),
      Price = as.numeric(Price),
      Change = as.numeric(Change),
      `Change %` = as.numeric(`Change %`),
      Volume = as.numeric(Volume),
      `Avg Vol (3M)` = as.numeric(`Avg Vol (3M)`),
      `Market Cap` = as.numeric(`Market Cap`),
      `P/E Ratio (TTM)` = as.numeric(`P/E Ratio (TTM)`),
      `52 Wk Change %` = as.numeric(`52 Wk Change %`),
      wk52_low = as.numeric(wk52_low),
      close_px = as.numeric(close_px),
      ma10 = as.numeric(ma10),
      ma20 = as.numeric(ma20),
      close_above_ma10 = as.logical(close_above_ma10),
      close_above_ma20 = as.logical(close_above_ma20),
      ma10_above_ma20 = as.logical(ma10_above_ma20),
      ma_setup_ok = as.logical(ma_setup_ok)
    )
}
```

```{r}
#ddd2 <- standardize_yahoo(ddd)
#data_enriched2 <- standardize_yahoo(data_enriched)

#merged_data <- bind_rows(ddd2, data_enriched2) %>%
 # distinct(Symbol, date, .keep_all = TRUE)

#glimpse(merged_data)
```

```{r}
#write.csv(merged_data,"merged_data22.csv")
```


```{r}
library(DBI)
library(RPostgres)
library(dplyr)

con <- dbConnect(
  RPostgres::Postgres(),
  host     = "aws-0-us-east-2.pooler.supabase.com",
  port     = 5432,
  dbname   = "postgres",
  user     = "postgres.zdizrqyeuyqdlmvgadkm",
  password = "DMPS1934*",
  sslmode  = "require"
)

dbExecute(con, '
  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.yahoo_52_week_gainers (
    "Symbol" text,
    "Name" text,
    "Price" double precision,
    "Change" double precision,
    "Change %" double precision,
    "Volume" double precision,
    "Avg Vol (3M)" double precision,
    "Market Cap" double precision,
    "P/E Ratio (TTM)" double precision,
    "52 Wk Change %" double precision,
    "wk52_low" double precision,
    "wk52_high" double precision,
    "start" double precision,
    "source_url" text,
    "Price_raw" text,
    "date" date,
    "close_px" double precision,
    "ma10" double precision,
    "ma20" double precision,
    "close_above_ma10" boolean,
    "close_above_ma20" boolean,
    "ma10_above_ma20" boolean,
    "ma_setup_ok" boolean,
    PRIMARY KEY ("Symbol", "date")
  );
')

upload_df <- data_enriched %>%
  transmute(
    Symbol = as.character(Symbol),
    Name = as.character(Name),
    Price = as.numeric(Price),
    Change = as.numeric(Change),
    `Change %` = as.numeric(`Change %`),
    Volume = as.numeric(Volume),
    `Avg Vol (3M)` = as.numeric(`Avg Vol (3M)`),
    `Market Cap` = as.numeric(`Market Cap`),
    `P/E Ratio (TTM)` = as.numeric(`P/E Ratio (TTM)`),
    `52 Wk Change %` = as.numeric(`52 Wk Change %`),
    wk52_low = as.numeric(wk52_low),
    wk52_high = as.numeric(wk52_high),
    start = as.numeric(start),
    source_url = as.character(source_url),
    Price_raw = as.character(Price_raw),
    date = as.Date(date),
    close_px = as.numeric(close_px),
    ma10 = as.numeric(ma10),
    ma20 = as.numeric(ma20),
    close_above_ma10 = as.logical(close_above_ma10),
    close_above_ma20 = as.logical(close_above_ma20),
    ma10_above_ma20 = as.logical(ma10_above_ma20),
    ma_setup_ok = as.logical(ma_setup_ok)
  ) %>%
  distinct(Symbol, date, .keep_all = TRUE)

dbWriteTable(
  con,
  "tmp_yahoo_52_week_gainers",
  upload_df,
  temporary = TRUE,
  overwrite = TRUE
)

dbExecute(con, '
  INSERT INTO public.yahoo_52_week_gainers AS t
    ("Symbol", "Name", "Price", "Change", "Change %", "Volume",
     "Avg Vol (3M)", "Market Cap", "P/E Ratio (TTM)", "52 Wk Change %",
     "wk52_low", "wk52_high", "start", "source_url", "Price_raw", "date",
     "close_px", "ma10", "ma20", "close_above_ma10", "close_above_ma20",
     "ma10_above_ma20", "ma_setup_ok")
  SELECT
    "Symbol", "Name", "Price", "Change", "Change %", "Volume",
    "Avg Vol (3M)", "Market Cap", "P/E Ratio (TTM)", "52 Wk Change %",
    "wk52_low", "wk52_high", "start", "source_url", "Price_raw", "date",
    "close_px", "ma10", "ma20", "close_above_ma10", "close_above_ma20",
    "ma10_above_ma20", "ma_setup_ok"
  FROM tmp_yahoo_52_week_gainers
  ON CONFLICT ("Symbol", "date") DO UPDATE
  SET
    "Name" = EXCLUDED."Name",
    "Price" = EXCLUDED."Price",
    "Change" = EXCLUDED."Change",
    "Change %" = EXCLUDED."Change %",
    "Volume" = EXCLUDED."Volume",
    "Avg Vol (3M)" = EXCLUDED."Avg Vol (3M)",
    "Market Cap" = EXCLUDED."Market Cap",
    "P/E Ratio (TTM)" = EXCLUDED."P/E Ratio (TTM)",
    "52 Wk Change %" = EXCLUDED."52 Wk Change %",
    "wk52_low" = EXCLUDED."wk52_low",
    "wk52_high" = EXCLUDED."wk52_high",
    "start" = EXCLUDED."start",
    "source_url" = EXCLUDED."source_url",
    "Price_raw" = EXCLUDED."Price_raw",
    "close_px" = EXCLUDED."close_px",
    "ma10" = EXCLUDED."ma10",
    "ma20" = EXCLUDED."ma20",
    "close_above_ma10" = EXCLUDED."close_above_ma10",
    "close_above_ma20" = EXCLUDED."close_above_ma20",
    "ma10_above_ma20" = EXCLUDED."ma10_above_ma20",
    "ma_setup_ok" = EXCLUDED."ma_setup_ok";
')

dbDisconnect(con)
```

####

```{r}
con <- dbConnect(
  RPostgres::Postgres(),
  host     = "aws-0-us-east-2.pooler.supabase.com",
  port     = 5432,
  dbname   = "postgres",
  user     = "postgres.zdizrqyeuyqdlmvgadkm",
  password = "DMPS1934*",
  sslmode  = "require"
)

data2 <- DBI::dbReadTable(con, "yahoo_52_week_gainers") %>%
  tibble::as_tibble()

glimpse(data2)
```

```{r}
data2 %>% count(date)
```


```{r}
#write.csv(data2,"90.csv")
```


#####

```{r}

#stock_df<- data %>% filter(date=="2026-04-06") 
```

########
#####


```{r}
library(DBI)
library(RPostgres)

con <- dbConnect(
  RPostgres::Postgres(),
  host     = "aws-0-us-east-2.pooler.supabase.com",
  port     = 5432,
  dbname   = "postgres",
  user     = "postgres.zdizrqyeuyqdlmvgadkm",
  password = "DMPS1934*",
  sslmode  = "require"
)

dbExecute(con, '
  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.yahoo_52wk_trades (
    symbol text NOT NULL,
    name text,
    signal_date date NOT NULL,
    entry_date date,
    ma10 double precision,
    ma20 double precision,
    ma100 double precision,
    open double precision,
    high double precision,
    low double precision,
    close double precision,
    entry_price double precision,
    stop_price double precision,
    stop_hit boolean,
    exit_price double precision,
    exit_reason text,
    hold_days integer,
    return_pct double precision,
    PRIMARY KEY (symbol, signal_date)
  );
')

dbDisconnect(con)

```

this one
```{r}
library(DBI)
library(RPostgres)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

con <- dbConnect(
  RPostgres::Postgres(),
  host     = "aws-0-us-east-2.pooler.supabase.com",
  port     = 5432,
  dbname   = "postgres",
  user     = "postgres.zdizrqyeuyqdlmvgadkm",
  password = "DMPS1934*",
  sslmode  = "require"
)

latest_date <- dbGetQuery(con, "
  SELECT MAX(date) AS prev_date
  FROM public.yahoo_52_week_gainers
  WHERE date < (
    SELECT MAX(date)
    FROM public.yahoo_52_week_gainers
  )
")$prev_date %>% as.Date()

stock_df <- dbGetQuery(
  con,
  paste0(
    "SELECT * FROM public.yahoo_52_week_gainers WHERE date = '",
    latest_date,
    "'"
  )
) %>%
  as_tibble()

dbDisconnect(con)

stock_df

```


```{r}
library(DBI)
library(RPostgres)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

con <- dbConnect(
  RPostgres::Postgres(),
  host     = "aws-0-us-east-2.pooler.supabase.com",
  port     = 5432,
  dbname   = "postgres",
  user     = "postgres.zdizrqyeuyqdlmvgadkm",
  password = "DMPS1934*",
  sslmode  = "require"
)

stock_df <- dbGetQuery(
  con,
  "SELECT * FROM public.yahoo_52_week_gainers"
) %>%
  as_tibble()

dbDisconnect(con)

stock_df

```

###stuff

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(jsonlite)
library(lubridate)
library(zoo)

download_yahoo_chart <- function(symbol, from, to, dest_folder = tempdir()) {
  period1 <- as.integer(as.POSIXct(from, tz = "UTC"))
  period2 <- as.integer(as.POSIXct(to,   tz = "UTC"))
  
  url <- paste0(
    "https://query1.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/",
    symbol,
    "?period1=", period1,
    "&period2=", period2,
    "&interval=1d&includePrePost=false&events=div%2Csplits"
  )
  
  json_file <- file.path(dest_folder, paste0(symbol, "_chart.json"))
  
  status <- tryCatch(
    system2(
      "curl.exe",
      args = c(
        "-L",
        "-A", "Mozilla/5.0",
        "-o", shQuote(json_file),
        url
      )
    ),
    error = function(e) 1
  )
  
  if (!file.exists(json_file) || status != 0) {
    message("Failed download: ", symbol)
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  txt <- paste(readLines(json_file, warn = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8"), collapse = "\n")
  
  obj <- tryCatch(fromJSON(txt, simplifyDataFrame = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(obj)) return(NULL)
  
  result <- obj$chart$result[[1]]
  if (is.null(result)) return(NULL)
  if (is.null(result$timestamp)) return(NULL)
  
  q <- result$indicators$quote[[1]]
  if (is.null(q)) return(NULL)
  
  tibble(
    symbol = symbol,
    date   = as.Date(as.POSIXct(result$timestamp, origin = "1970-01-01", tz = "UTC")),
    open   = as.numeric(q$open),
    high   = as.numeric(q$high),
    low    = as.numeric(q$low),
    close  = as.numeric(q$close),
    volume = as.numeric(q$volume)
  ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(date), !is.na(close))
}

flag_bad_history <- function(prices_tbl, min_nonzero_days = 20, min_total_days = 100) {
  prices_tbl %>%
    mutate(
      flat_bar = !is.na(open) & !is.na(high) & !is.na(low) & !is.na(close) &
        open == high & high == low & low == close,
      zero_vol = is.na(volume) | volume == 0
    ) %>%
    group_by(symbol) %>%
    summarise(
      n_days = n(),
      nonzero_vol_days = sum(!zero_vol, na.rm = TRUE),
      flat_zero_days = sum(flat_bar & zero_vol, na.rm = TRUE),
      all_flat_zero = all(flat_bar & zero_vol),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      bad_history = all_flat_zero |
        nonzero_vol_days < min_nonzero_days |
        n_days < min_total_days
    )
}

run_open_to_close_strategy_curl <- function(stock_df,
                                            stop_loss = 0.03,
                                            lookback_days = 220,
                                            min_nonzero_days = 20,
                                            min_total_days = 100) {
  tickers <- stock_df %>%
    pull(Symbol) %>%
    unique()
  
  signal_dates <- unique(as.Date(stock_df$date))
  if (length(signal_dates) != 1) {
    stop("stock_df debe tener una sola signal date por corrida.")
  }
  
  signal_date <- signal_dates[1]
  
  from_date <- signal_date - lookback_days
  to_date   <- signal_date + 10
  
  prices_list <- purrr::map(tickers, ~ download_yahoo_chart(.x, from = from_date, to = to_date))
  names(prices_list) <- tickers
  
  failed <- names(prices_list)[purrr::map_lgl(prices_list, is.null)]
  if (length(failed) > 0) {
    message("Failed tickers: ", paste(failed, collapse = ", "))
  }
  
  valid_prices <- prices_list[!purrr::map_lgl(prices_list, is.null)]
  
  if (length(valid_prices) == 0) {
    stop("No se pudo descargar ningún ticker con curl.")
  }
  
  prices <- bind_rows(valid_prices)
  
  quality_tbl <- flag_bad_history(
    prices,
    min_nonzero_days = min_nonzero_days,
    min_total_days = min_total_days
  )
  
  bad_symbols <- quality_tbl %>%
    filter(bad_history) %>%
    pull(symbol)
  
  if (length(bad_symbols) > 0) {
    message("Excluded bad symbols: ", paste(bad_symbols, collapse = ", "))
  }
  
  prices <- prices %>%
    filter(!symbol %in% bad_symbols)
  
  if (nrow(prices) == 0) {
    stop("Todos los tickers fueron excluidos por mala calidad de historia.")
  }
  
  signals <- prices %>%
    group_by(symbol) %>%
    arrange(.data$date, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(
      ma10  = zoo::rollmean(close, 10, fill = NA, align = "right"),
      ma20  = zoo::rollmean(close, 20, fill = NA, align = "right"),
      ma100 = zoo::rollmean(close, 100, fill = NA, align = "right")
    ) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  signal_tbl <- signals %>%
    filter(.data$date == signal_date) %>%
   mutate(
  pass_filter = !is.na(ma10) & !is.na(ma20) & !is.na(ma100) &
    close > ma10 &
    ma10 > ma20 &
    close > ma100) %>%
    select(symbol, signal_date = date, ma10, ma20, ma100, pass_filter)
  
  entry_tbl <- signals %>%
    filter(.data$date > signal_date) %>%
    group_by(symbol) %>%
    slice_min(order_by = .data$date, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    select(symbol, entry_date = date, open, high, low, close)
  
  trades <- signal_tbl %>%
    filter(pass_filter) %>%
    inner_join(entry_tbl, by = "symbol") %>%
    mutate(
      entry_price = open,
      stop_price  = entry_price * (1 - stop_loss),
      stop_hit    = low <= stop_price,
      exit_price  = if_else(stop_hit, stop_price, close),
      exit_reason = if_else(stop_hit, "stop_loss", "close_exit"),
      hold_days   = 1L,
      return_pct  = (exit_price / entry_price - 1) * 100
    )
  
  stock_df %>%
    rename(symbol = Symbol, name = Name) %>%
    select(
      -any_of(c(
        "ma10", "ma20", "ma100", "close_px",
        "close_above_ma10", "close_above_ma20",
        "ma10_above_ma20", "ma_setup_ok"
      ))
    ) %>%
    inner_join(trades, by = "symbol") %>%
    select(
      symbol, name,
      signal_date, entry_date,
      ma10, ma20, ma100,
      open, high, low, close,
      entry_price, stop_price, stop_hit,
      exit_price, exit_reason, hold_days, return_pct
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(return_pct))
}

```

```{r}
safe_run_strategy <- function(df) {
  tryCatch(
    run_open_to_close_strategy_curl(df, stop_loss = 0.03),
    error = function(e) {
      message("Failed date: ", unique(df$date), " -> ", e$message)
      tibble()
    }
  )
}

all_results <- stock_df %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
 # filter(date < max(date, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%   # remove latest signal date
  group_split(date) %>%
  purrr::map_dfr(safe_run_strategy)
  
```

```{r}
write.csv(all_results,"all_results.csv")
```



```{r}
all_results %>% count(entry_date)
```


```{r}
library(DBI)
library(RPostgres)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

# optional: inspect before upload
glimpse(all_results)
print(nrow(all_results))

if (nrow(all_results) == 0) {
  stop("all_results has 0 rows, so there is nothing to upload.")
}

# make sure column types match your Supabase table
results_to_upload <- all_results %>%
  mutate(
    symbol      = as.character(symbol),
    name        = as.character(name),
    signal_date = as.Date(signal_date),
    entry_date  = as.Date(entry_date),
    ma10        = as.numeric(ma10),
    ma20        = as.numeric(ma20),
    ma100       = as.numeric(ma100),
    open        = as.numeric(open),
    high        = as.numeric(high),
    low         = as.numeric(low),
    close       = as.numeric(close),
    entry_price = as.numeric(entry_price),
    stop_price  = as.numeric(stop_price),
    stop_hit    = as.logical(stop_hit),
    exit_price  = as.numeric(exit_price),
    exit_reason = as.character(exit_reason),
    hold_days   = as.integer(hold_days),
    return_pct  = as.numeric(return_pct)
  ) %>%
  distinct(symbol, signal_date, .keep_all = TRUE)

con <- dbConnect(
  RPostgres::Postgres(),
  host     = "aws-0-us-east-2.pooler.supabase.com",
  port     = 5432,
  dbname   = "postgres",
  user     = "postgres.zdizrqyeuyqdlmvgadkm",
  password = "DMPS1934*",
  sslmode  = "require"
)

# write to temporary staging table
dbWriteTable(
  con,
  Id(schema = "public", table = "tmp_yahoo_52wk_trades"),
  results_to_upload,
  overwrite = TRUE,
  temporary = FALSE
)

# upsert into final table
dbExecute(con, "
INSERT INTO public.yahoo_52wk_trades (
  symbol, name, signal_date, entry_date,
  ma10, ma20, ma100,
  open, high, low, close,
  entry_price, stop_price, stop_hit,
  exit_price, exit_reason, hold_days, return_pct
)
SELECT
  symbol, name, signal_date, entry_date,
  ma10, ma20, ma100,
  open, high, low, close,
  entry_price, stop_price, stop_hit,
  exit_price, exit_reason, hold_days, return_pct
FROM public.tmp_yahoo_52wk_trades
ON CONFLICT (symbol, signal_date)
DO UPDATE SET
  name        = EXCLUDED.name,
  entry_date  = EXCLUDED.entry_date,
  ma10        = EXCLUDED.ma10,
  ma20        = EXCLUDED.ma20,
  ma100       = EXCLUDED.ma100,
  open        = EXCLUDED.open,
  high        = EXCLUDED.high,
  low         = EXCLUDED.low,
  close       = EXCLUDED.close,
  entry_price = EXCLUDED.entry_price,
  stop_price  = EXCLUDED.stop_price,
  stop_hit    = EXCLUDED.stop_hit,
  exit_price  = EXCLUDED.exit_price,
  exit_reason = EXCLUDED.exit_reason,
  hold_days   = EXCLUDED.hold_days,
  return_pct  = EXCLUDED.return_pct;
")

# optional cleanup
dbExecute(con, "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS public.tmp_yahoo_52wk_trades")

# verify insert
check_n <- dbGetQuery(con, "SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM public.yahoo_52wk_trades")
print(check_n)

dbDisconnect(con)
```

```{r}

con <- dbConnect(
  RPostgres::Postgres(),
  host     = "aws-0-us-east-2.pooler.supabase.com",
  port     = 5432,
  dbname   = "postgres",
  user     = "postgres.zdizrqyeuyqdlmvgadkm",
  password = "DMPS1934*",
  sslmode  = "require")

data3 <- DBI::dbReadTable(con, "yahoo_52wk_trades") %>%
  tibble::as_tibble()


```

```{r}
data3 %>% filter(entry_date=="2026-04-16") %>% arrange(desc(return_pct))
```

```{r}

overall_stats <- data3 %>%
  summarise(
    n_trades = n(),
    wins = sum(return_pct > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    losses = sum(return_pct <= 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    win_rate = mean(return_pct > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_return = mean(return_pct, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_return = median(return_pct, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_return = sum(return_pct, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

overall_stats
```

```{r}
overall_stats %>%
  mutate(win_rate = win_rate * 100)
```




```{r}
win_rate_by_entry_day <- data3 %>%
  group_by(entry_date) %>%
  summarise(
    n_trades = n(),
    wins = sum(return_pct > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    losses = sum(return_pct <= 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    win_rate = mean(return_pct > 0, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    avg_return = mean(return_pct, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_return = median(return_pct, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_return = sum(return_pct, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(entry_date)

win_rate_by_entry_day
```


```{r}
library(dplyr)

position_size <- 100

trades_dollars <- all_results %>%
  mutate(
    pnl_dollars = position_size * (return_pct / 100),
    end_value = position_size + pnl_dollars
  )

# money made per actual trading day
daily_pnl <- trades_dollars %>%
  group_by(entry_date) %>%
  summarise(
    n_trades = n(),
    capital_deployed = n_trades * position_size,
    daily_pnl = sum(pnl_dollars, na.rm = TRUE),
    end_of_day_value = capital_deployed + daily_pnl,
    avg_pnl_per_trade = mean(pnl_dollars, na.rm = TRUE),
    win_rate = mean(return_pct > 0, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(entry_date)

daily_pnl
```


```{r}
overall_pnl <- trades_dollars %>%
  summarise(
    total_trades = n(),
    total_capital_deployed = total_trades * position_size,
    total_pnl = sum(pnl_dollars, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_end_value = total_capital_deployed + total_pnl,
    avg_pnl_per_trade = mean(pnl_dollars, na.rm = TRUE),
    win_rate = mean(return_pct > 0, na.rm = TRUE) * 100
  )

overall_pnl
```

```{r}
daily_pnl_running <- trades_dollars %>%
  group_by(entry_date) %>%
  summarise(
    daily_pnl = sum(position_size * (return_pct / 100), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(entry_date) %>%
  mutate(cum_pnl = cumsum(daily_pnl))

daily_pnl_running
```

```{r}
position_size <- 100

daily_summary <- data3 %>%
  mutate(pnl_dollars = position_size * return_pct / 100) %>%
  group_by(entry_date) %>%
  summarise(
    trades = n(),
    invested_that_day = trades * position_size,
    pnl_that_day = sum(pnl_dollars, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(entry_date) %>%
  mutate(
    cumulative_pnl = cumsum(pnl_that_day)
  )

daily_summary
```


```{r}
sum(data3$return_pct / 100 * 100, na.rm = TRUE)
```



```{r}
sum(data3$return_pct, na.rm = TRUE)
```

##########CURVE

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

initial_capital <- 10000
position_size <- 100

daily_equity <- data3 %>%
  mutate(
    pnl_dollars = position_size * (return_pct / 100)
  ) %>%
  group_by(entry_date) %>%
  summarise(
    trades = n(),
    capital_deployed = trades * position_size,
    daily_pnl = sum(pnl_dollars, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(entry_date) %>%
  mutate(
    cumulative_pnl = cumsum(daily_pnl),
    equity = initial_capital + cumulative_pnl,
    peak_equity = cummax(equity),
    drawdown_dollars = equity - peak_equity,
    drawdown_pct = 100 * (equity / peak_equity - 1)
  )

daily_equity
```

```{r}
overall_summary <- daily_equity %>%
  summarise(
    start_capital = initial_capital,
    end_capital = last(equity),
    total_profit = last(cumulative_pnl),
    total_return_pct = 100 * (last(equity) / initial_capital - 1),
    best_day = max(daily_pnl, na.rm = TRUE),
    worst_day = min(daily_pnl, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_drawdown_pct = min(drawdown_pct, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

overall_summary
```

```{r}
ggplot(daily_equity, aes(x = entry_date, y = equity)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    title = "Equity Curve: $10,000 Start, $100 Per Trade",
    x = "Entry Date",
    y = "Equity ($)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
daily_equity %>%
  select(
    entry_date,
    trades,
    capital_deployed,
    daily_pnl,
    cumulative_pnl,
    equity,
    drawdown_pct
  )
```








```{r}
stock_df_for_strategy <- stock_df %>%
  rename(
    Symbol = Symbol,
    Name = Name,
    date = date
  )
```


```{r}

library(DBI)
library(RPostgres)
library(dplyr)

trade_upload <- results %>%
  transmute(
    symbol      = as.character(symbol),
    name        = as.character(name),
    signal_date = as.Date(signal_date),
    entry_date  = as.Date(entry_date),
    ma10        = as.numeric(ma10),
    ma20        = as.numeric(ma20),
    ma100       = as.numeric(ma100),
    open        = as.numeric(open),
    high        = as.numeric(high),
    low         = as.numeric(low),
    close       = as.numeric(close),
    entry_price = as.numeric(entry_price),
    stop_price  = as.numeric(stop_price),
    stop_hit    = as.logical(stop_hit),
    exit_price  = as.numeric(exit_price),
    exit_reason = as.character(exit_reason),
    hold_days   = as.integer(hold_days),
    return_pct  = as.numeric(return_pct)
  ) %>%
  distinct(symbol, signal_date, .keep_all = TRUE)

con <- dbConnect(
  RPostgres::Postgres(),
  host     = "aws-0-us-east-2.pooler.supabase.com",
  port     = 5432,
  dbname   = "postgres",
  user     = "postgres.zdizrqyeuyqdlmvgadkm",
  password = "DMPS1934*",
  sslmode  = "require"
)

dbWriteTable(
  con,
  "tmp_yahoo_52wk_trades",
  trade_upload,
  temporary = TRUE,
  overwrite = TRUE
)

dbExecute(con, '
  INSERT INTO public.yahoo_52wk_trades AS t
    (symbol, name, signal_date, entry_date, ma10, ma20, ma100,
     open, high, low, close, entry_price, stop_price, stop_hit,
     exit_price, exit_reason, hold_days, return_pct)
  SELECT
    symbol, name, signal_date, entry_date, ma10, ma20, ma100,
    open, high, low, close, entry_price, stop_price, stop_hit,
    exit_price, exit_reason, hold_days, return_pct
  FROM tmp_yahoo_52wk_trades
  ON CONFLICT (symbol, signal_date) DO UPDATE
  SET
    name        = EXCLUDED.name,
    entry_date  = EXCLUDED.entry_date,
    ma10        = EXCLUDED.ma10,
    ma20        = EXCLUDED.ma20,
    ma100       = EXCLUDED.ma100,
    open        = EXCLUDED.open,
    high        = EXCLUDED.high,
    low         = EXCLUDED.low,
    close       = EXCLUDED.close,
    entry_price = EXCLUDED.entry_price,
    stop_price  = EXCLUDED.stop_price,
    stop_hit    = EXCLUDED.stop_hit,
    exit_price  = EXCLUDED.exit_price,
    exit_reason = EXCLUDED.exit_reason,
    hold_days   = EXCLUDED.hold_days,
    return_pct  = EXCLUDED.return_pct;
')

dbDisconnect(con)


```
